message:
🐛 Add missing assertion to a11y heading hierarchy test (#10564)

Fixes #10532

The headings-have-proper-hierarchy test logged violations but had no
expect() call, allowing heading order violations to pass CI silently.

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
